---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .eq-hero{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;padding:2.5rem 2rem;}
  .eq-hero h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;margin:0 0 .4rem;}
  .eq-hero p{opacity:.7;margin:0;font-size:1rem;}
  .eq-wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .eq-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.25rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .eq-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .eq-card h3{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;margin:0 0 1rem;color:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);}
  .eq-controls{display:flex;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .eq-controls select{padding:.5rem .75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:6px;font-size:.9rem;}
  .eq-controls select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .eq-topbar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
  .eq-metric{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .eq-metric .val{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .eq-metric .lbl{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);margin-top:.15rem;}
  .eq-region-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.85rem;}
  .eq-region-table thead{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;}
  .eq-region-table th{padding:.6rem .75rem;text-align:left;font-weight:600;}
  .eq-region-table td{padding:.5rem .75rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);}
  .eq-region-table tbody tr:hover{background:rgba(201,162,39,.03);}
  .eq-bar{height:8px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--map-bg-section,#f1f5f9);overflow:hidden;min-width:80px;}
  .eq-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width .3s;}
  .eq-table-scroll{max-height:380px;overflow-y:auto;}
  .eq-note{padding:1rem 1.25rem;background:rgba(201,162,39,.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.12);border-radius:8px;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);margin-top:1.5rem;}
  canvas{max-height:300px !important;}
  @media(max-width:768px){.eq-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
</style>

<section class="eq-hero">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>General Information</h1>
    <p>Country-level descriptive statistics derived from the standardised registry. Facility counts, type mix, ownership split, and regional distribution.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="eq-wrap">

  <div class="eq-controls">
    <label style="font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;">Country:</label>
    <select id="eq-country">
      <option value="kenya">Kenya</option>
      <option value="tanzania">Tanzania</option>
      <option value="nigeria">Nigeria</option>
      <option value="uganda">Uganda</option>
      <option value="zambia">Zambia</option>
      <option value="malawi">Malawi</option>
      <option value="botswana">Botswana</option>
      <option value="ethiopia">Ethiopia</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <!-- Top metrics -->
  <div class="eq-topbar" id="eq-topbar"></div>

  <!-- Charts grid -->
  <div class="eq-grid">
    <div class="eq-card">
      <h3>Facility Type Distribution</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-type"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="eq-card">
      <h3>Ownership Breakdown</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-ownership"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="eq-grid">
    <div class="eq-card">
      <h3>Facilities by Region</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-region" style="max-height:350px!important;"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="eq-card">
      <h3>Regional Facility Distribution</h3>
      <div class="eq-table-scroll">
        <table class="eq-region-table">
          <thead><tr><th>Region</th><th>Facilities</th><th>Public %</th><th>Distribution</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody id="eq-region-tbody"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var CDATA = {
    kenya:   {file:'etl/data/processed/country_standardized/kenya_standardized.csv', bounds:[-4.7,5.5,33.9,41.9]},
    tanzania:{file:'data/tanzania/tanzania_standardized.csv', bounds:[-11.8,-1.0,29.2,40.6]},
    nigeria: {file:'data/Nigeria/nigeria_standardized.csv',   bounds:[4,14,2.7,14.7]},
    uganda:  {file:'data/Uganda/uganda_standardized.csv',     bounds:[-1.5,4.3,29.5,35.1]},
    zambia:  {file:'data/Zambia/zambia_standardized.csv',     bounds:[-18.1,-8.2,21.9,33.7]},
    malawi:  {file:'data/Malawi/malawi_standardized.csv',     bounds:[-17.2,-9.3,32.6,36]},
    botswana:{file:'etl/data/processed/country_standardized/botswana_standardized.csv', bounds:[-27,-17.7,19.9,29.4]},
    ethiopia:{file:'etl/data/processed/country_standardized/ethiopia_standardized.csv', bounds:[3.0,15.0,33.0,48.0]}
  };
  var cache = {};
  var chartType, chartOwn, chartRegion;
  var COLORS = ['#c9a227','#2563eb','#059669','#f59e0b','#8b5cf6','#06b6d4','#ec4899','#84cc16','#f97316','#6366f1','#14b8a6','#e11d48','#0ea5e9','#a855f7','#eab308'];

  function inBounds(lat,lon,b){ return lat>=b[0]&&lat<=b[1]&&lon>=b[2]&&lon<=b[3]; }

  function loadCountry(key){
    if(cache[key]){ render(cache[key]); return; }
    var b = CDATA[key].bounds;
    Papa.parse(CDATA[key].file,{
      download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
      complete:function(res){
        cache[key] = res.data.filter(function(r){
          if(!r.facility_name || r.facility_name==='facility_name') return false;
          // Null out bad coords
          var la=parseFloat(r.latitude), lo=parseFloat(r.longitude);
          if(!isNaN(la)&&!isNaN(lo)&&!inBounds(la,lo,b)){ r.latitude=''; r.longitude=''; }
          return true;
        });
        render(cache[key]);
      }
    });
  }

  function render(data){
    // Top metrics
    var total = data.length;
    var withCoords = data.filter(function(f){return f.latitude && f.longitude && !isNaN(parseFloat(f.latitude));}).length;
    var publicCount = data.filter(function(f){
      var o = (f.facility_ownership||'').toLowerCase();
      return o.indexOf('public')>-1||o.indexOf('gov')>-1||o==='moh';
    }).length;
    var operating = data.filter(function(f){
      var s=(f.status||'').toLowerCase();
      return s==='operating'||s==='functional'||s==='operational';
    }).length;
    var regions = {};
    data.forEach(function(f){
      var r = f.admin1 || f.admin2 || 'Unknown';
      if(!regions[r]) regions[r]={total:0,pub:0};
      regions[r].total++;
      var o=(f.facility_ownership||'').toLowerCase();
      if(o.indexOf('public')>-1||o.indexOf('gov')>-1||o==='moh') regions[r].pub++;
    });
    var regionCount = Object.keys(regions).length;
    var avgPerRegion = regionCount>0 ? Math.round(total/regionCount) : 0;

    // Min / max region
    var regionEntries = Object.entries(regions).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].total-a[1].total;});
    var maxRegion = regionEntries[0] ? regionEntries[0] : ['N/A',{total:0}];
    var minRegion = regionEntries[regionEntries.length-1] ? regionEntries[regionEntries.length-1] : ['N/A',{total:0}];
    var ratio = minRegion[1].total > 0 ? (maxRegion[1].total / minRegion[1].total).toFixed(1) : '&infin;';

    document.getElementById('eq-topbar').innerHTML =
      '<div class="eq-metric"><div class="val">'+total.toLocaleString()+'</div><div class="lbl">Total Facilities</div></div>'+
      '<div class="eq-metric"><div class="val">'+regionCount+'</div><div class="lbl">Regions</div></div>'+
      '<div class="eq-metric"><div class="val">'+Math.round(publicCount/total*100)+'%</div><div class="lbl">Public Ownership</div></div>'+
      '<div class="eq-metric"><div class="val">'+Math.round(withCoords/total*100)+'%</div><div class="lbl">Geocoded</div></div>';

    // Type chart
    var types = {};
    data.forEach(function(f){types[f.facility_type||'Unknown']=(types[f.facility_type||'Unknown']||0)+1;});
    var typeEntries = Object.entries(types).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,8);
    if(chartType) chartType.destroy();
    chartType = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-type'),{
      type:'doughnut',
      data:{labels:typeEntries.map(function(e){return e[0];}), datasets:[{data:typeEntries.map(function(e){return e[1];}), backgroundColor:COLORS.slice(0,typeEntries.length), borderWidth:0}]},
      options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}}}
    });

    // Ownership chart
    var owns = {};
    data.forEach(function(f){owns[f.facility_ownership||'Unknown']=(owns[f.facility_ownership||'Unknown']||0)+1;});
    var ownEntries = Object.entries(owns).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,8);
    if(chartOwn) chartOwn.destroy();
    chartOwn = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-ownership'),{
      type:'doughnut',
      data:{labels:ownEntries.map(function(e){return e[0];}), datasets:[{data:ownEntries.map(function(e){return e[1];}), backgroundColor:COLORS.slice(0,ownEntries.length), borderWidth:0}]},
      options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}}}
    });

    // Region bar chart (top 15)
    var topRegions = regionEntries.slice(0,15);
    if(chartRegion) chartRegion.destroy();
    chartRegion = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-region'),{
      type:'bar',
      data:{
        labels:topRegions.map(function(e){return e[0];}),
        datasets:[{label:'Facilities',data:topRegions.map(function(e){return e[1].total;}),backgroundColor:'#c9a227',borderRadius:4}]
      },
      options:{
        indexAxis:'y', responsive:true,
        plugins:{legend:{display:false}},
        scales:{x:{grid:{display:false}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:11}}}}
      }
    });

    // Region table
    var maxCount = regionEntries[0] ? regionEntries[0][1].total : 1;
    var tbody = '';
    regionEntries.forEach(function(e){
      var pct = e[1].total > 0 ? Math.round(e[1].pub/e[1].total*100) : 0;
      var barW = Math.round(e[1].total/maxCount*100);
      tbody += '<tr><td><strong>'+e[0]+'</strong></td><td>'+e[1].total.toLocaleString()+'</td><td>'+pct+'%</td>'+
        '<td><div class="eq-bar"><div class="eq-bar-fill" style="width:'+barW+'%;background:#c9a227;"></div></div></td></tr>';
    });
    document.getElementById('eq-region-tbody').innerHTML = tbody;
  }

  document.getElementById('eq-country').addEventListener('change',function(){
    loadCountry(this.value);
  });

  loadCountry('tanzania');
})();
</script>
```
